quality.formatting_notes: The description uses internal markdown links ('[paralyzed](#paralyzed)', '[attunement](#section-attunement)') which might need external resolution depending on the target system, but the core mechanic description is complete.

charges.destruction_threshold: Roll d20 on last charge; 1 results in destruction

effect.duration_control: Target can repeat the saving throw at the end of each of its turns to end the effect early.
